global.description: An ad for VantaStyle that features a solid blue background covering the entire canvas, creating a vibrant and engaging backdrop. In the top left corner, there is a light blue rounded rectangle containing the text 'VantaStyle' in white, which serves as the logo. Below the logo, two vertically aligned rounded rectangles with a light blue fill and a darker blue outline overlap slightly, suggesting a reflective surface. Centrally positioned within the upper section of the ad is a tall, rounded rectangle in light blue with a darker blue outline, featuring a diagonal line that runs from the top left to the bottom right corner. This element adds depth and interest to the design. Further down, there is another blue rounded rectangle with a diagonal line, occupying a significant portion of the space and contributing to the overall aesthetic. Towards the bottom left, a light blue circle with a horizontal line across its center adds a decorative touch. In the center of the ad, occupying the lower half, is a rectangular text box with a light blue background displaying the bold white text 'Flash sale live' along with smaller white text 'Free shipping over $25' underneath, effectively communicating the promotional message. At the bottom center of the ad, slightly elevated from the edge, is a rounded rectangular button in white with the text 'Start now' in bold black font, creating a clear call to action. Additionally, in the top left corner, there is a black text reading 'UGC' in a bold font, positioned inside a white rounded rectangle with a slight shadow effect, enhancing its visibility against the blue background.
global.main_message: Promoting a flash sale with a clear call to action for immediate engagement.
global.emotional_tone: Energetic and inviting, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: Solid blue background covering the full canvas.

elements.label: VantaStyle Logo
elements.description: A light blue rounded rectangle containing the text 'VantaStyle' in white, positioned at the top left corner of the ad. The background of the ad is a darker blue.

elements.label: Two Rounded Rectangles
elements.description: Two vertically aligned rounded rectangles with a light blue fill and a darker blue outline. Each rectangle has a diagonal line across it, suggesting a reflective surface. They are positioned in the upper left section of the ad, slightly overlapping, with the left rectangle being slightly taller than the right.

elements.label: Blue Rectangle with Diagonal Line
elements.description: A tall, rounded rectangle in a light blue color with a darker blue outline. It features a single diagonal line running from the top left to the bottom right corner. This element is positioned centrally within the bounding box, contributing to the overall design of the ad.

elements.label: Blue Rounded Rectangle
elements.description: A blue rounded rectangle shape with a diagonal line running from the top left to the bottom right. It is positioned centrally within the ad, occupying a significant portion of the space. The edges are smooth, and the color is a lighter shade of blue compared to the background.

elements.label: Blue Background Panel
elements.description: A solid blue rectangular panel that occupies the entire background of the ad. It has a smooth texture and provides a vibrant backdrop for the other elements in the ad.

elements.label: Light Blue Circle
elements.description: A light blue circle with a horizontal line across its center, positioned towards the bottom left of the ad, approximately 43.75 pixels from the left and 353.12 pixels from the top. The circle has a smooth, rounded appearance.

elements.label: Sale Announcement Text
elements.description: A rectangular text box with a light blue background, displaying the text 'Flash sale live' in bold white font. Below it, in smaller white font, is the text 'Free shipping over $25'. The text box is positioned centrally within the ad, occupying the lower half of the bounding box.
elements.text_content: Flash sale live Free shipping over $25

elements.label: VantaStyle text logo
elements.description: The element is a white text logo that reads 'VantaStyle' in a bold, modern font. It is positioned in the top left corner of the ad, occupying a small rectangular area against a blue background.

elements.label: Start Now Button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button in white with the text 'Start now' in bold black font. It is positioned at the bottom center of the ad, slightly elevated from the bottom edge, creating a clear call to action.

elements.label: UGC Text
elements.description: The element is a black text reading 'UGC' in a bold font. It is positioned in the top left corner of the ad, inside a white rounded rectangle that has a slight shadow effect, making it stand out against the blue background.

embedding_texts.global_text: This ad for VantaStyle features a vibrant blue background, a prominent logo, decorative elements, and a clear promotional message with a call to action.
embedding_texts.elements_text: background: solid blue; main_subject: VantaStyle logo, sale announcement text, start now button
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Flash sale live Free shipping over $25 Start now UGC VantaStyle
